name: ASUS EX-B760M-V5 PLUS,  Intel® B760 (LGA 1700) mATX motherboard  DDR5, PCIe® 4.0, 8 power stages, Realtek 2.5 Gb Ethernet, HDMI, VGA, USB 3.2 Gen 1, luminous anti-moisture coating, Lightning Boot
